name: Edgeband
description: A band hugging one edge of each cell, the strip sliding to a new side on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: @pick(polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 28%, 0 28%), polygon(0 72%, 100% 72%, 100% 100%, 0 100%), polygon(0 0, 28% 0, 28% 100%, 0 100%), polygon(72% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 72% 100%)); clip-path: @pick(polygon(0 0, 100% 0, 100% 28%, 0 28%), polygon(0 72%, 100% 72%, 100% 100%, 0 100%), polygon(0 0, 28% 0, 28% 100%, 0 100%), polygon(72% 0, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 72% 100%)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
